memories.value: Will track brand consistency scores over time to detect gradual drift. Record weekly averages per dimension (tone, visual, messaging, terminology) and flag downward trends.
Will log guideline ambiguities and edge cases discovered during content review. Flag items for human clarification when guidelines are unclear or contradictory.
First run. Read brand_guidelines to establish baseline scoring criteria. Review recent content_items to calibrate scoring. Set initial brand health benchmark.
